sentence_reviews.text: Diffusion and score-based models learn to reverse a staged corruption process, synthesizing samples by iterative denoising or integration of a learned score field.

sentence_reviews.text: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Denoising diffusion & stochastic corruption, Score matching & denoising score objectives.
